name: Strange Supreme
ability: Gains +2 Power from merging. End of Turn: Merge one of your created cards into this.

name: Strong Guy
ability: Ongoing: +6 Power if your hand has 1 or fewer cards.

name: Stryfe
ability: Objective: Play 3 On Reveal cards  Use the highest-Cost On Reveal in your hand. (0/3)

name: Sub-Mariner
ability: When this is Empowered, add a random 1-Cost character to your hand with that same increase. (if in hand or in play)

name: Subterranean Summons
ability: On Reveal: Give each created card in your hand -1 Cost or +3 Power.

name: Summoning Ritual 1
ability: On Reveal: Merge your highest-Power destroyed card into Dormammu to continue. (step 1/3)

name: Summoning Ritual 2
ability: On Reveal: Dormammu steals 1 Power from EACH card here to continue. (step 2/3)

name: Summoning Ritual 3
ability: On Reveal: Destroy 2 of your characters here to summon Dormammu. (step 3/3)

name: Sunspot
ability: End of Turn: Gain +1 Power for each unspent Energy.

name: Super-Adaptoid
ability: On Reveal: Steal the text from an enemy Activate card here.

name: Super-Skrull
ability: Ongoing: Has the Ongoing effects of all enemy cards.

name: Supergiant
ability: On Reveal: All cards played next turn don't reveal until the game ends.

name: Superior Iron Man
ability: !none

name: Superior Spider-Man
ability: At the start of each turn, you get +1 Energy if you have any cards with increased Power in play.

name: Surge
ability: On Reveal: Give the top card of your deck -1 Cost and +1 Power. After you play it, repeat this ability.

name: Surtur
ability: After you play a card with 10 or more Power, this gains +2 Power.

name: Swarm
ability: When Discarded: Add two copies of this that cost 0 to your hand.

name: Sword Master
ability: On Reveal: Discard an odd-costed card from your hand.

name: Sword of Fu Xi
ability: Ongoing: If Lin Lie Iron Fist is here, he has +8 Power.

name: Symbiote Spider-Man
ability: Activate: Merge your lowest-Cost card here into this. Copy its text like it just revealed.

name: Symbiote Spider-Man - Spider-Verse
ability: Activate: Merge one of your cards here into this. Replace that card with a Spider-Verse card from your deck.

name: Tao Mandala
ability: On Reveal: Copy the text of one of your Ongoing cards here onto your other characters here.

name: Tarantula
ability: End of Turn: If you have the highest Power among cards in play, give this and 2 cards in your hand +1 Power.

name: Taskmaster
ability: On Reveal: Set this card's Power equal to that of the last card you played. (if able)

name: Taskmaster - Thunderbolts
ability: On Reveal: Gains Power equal to your other highest-Power Thunderbolt.

name: Techno-Organic Virus
ability: On Reveal: Infect your other cards here (replace their text). Copy this to your hand.

name: Techno-Organic Virus Infection
ability: Ongoing: +1 Power for each Techno-Organic Virus you've played. (+0)

name: Temporal Manipulation
ability: On Reveal: Give Agamotto +3 Power. Put him into your hand if he's not in play.

name: Terrax the Tamer
ability: On Reveal: For each location, shuffle a Rock into the losing player's deck.

name: Thaddeus Ross
ability: End of Turn: If your opponent has unspent Energy, draw a card with 10 or more Power.

name: Thanos
ability: Game Start: Shuffle the six Infinity Stones into your deck.

name: Thanos Champion
ability: Game Start: Shuffle the six Infinity Stones into your deck.

name: Thanos Fractured Frontier
ability: Game Start: Load an Infinity Shot. Your cards have "Quickdraw: Thanos loads again." On Reveal: Fire all loaded Shots.

name: The Ancient One
ability: On Reveal: Add Tao Mandala to your hand.

name: The Collector
flavor: When a card enters your hand from anywhere (except your deck), +1 Power.

name: The Fallen One
ability: On Reveal: Set your Max Energy equal to this card's Power.

name: The First Ghost Rider
ability: On Reveal: Discard the lowest-Power card from your hand. Remove that card's Power from this.

name: The Hood
ability: On Reveal: Add a Demon to your hand.

name: The Hunger
ability: On Reveal: Horde +3.

name: The Infinaut
ability: If you played a card last turn, you can't play this.

name: The Inversion
ability: !none

name: The Living Tribunal
ability: Ongoing: Split your total Power evenly among all locations.

name: The Ten Rings
ability: On Reveal: Give one of your other cards here +1 Power.

name: The Ten Rings Upgraded
ability: End of Turn: Give your other cards here +1 Power.

name: The Thing First Steps
ability: End of Turn: +2 Power. Once per game, if your side here is full, destroy an enemy card here with less Power.

name: The Thing First Steps Champion
ability: End of Turn: +2 Power. Once per game, if your side here is full, destroy an enemy card here with less Power.

name: Thena
ability: End of Turn: +3 Power if you played (exactly) 2 cards.

name: Thor
ability: On Reveal: Shuffle Mjolnir into your deck.

name: Thor - Avengers
ability: On Reveal: Draw an Avenger, then shuffle Mjolnir into your deck.

name: Thor Champion
ability: On Reveal: Shuffle Mjolnir into your deck.

name: Thundering Hammer
ability: On Reveal: Shuffle Mjolnir into your deck. Draw a card.

name: Time Shot
ability: !Reduce the cost of your cards in hand by 1.

name: Time Stone
ability: On Reveal: Draw a card. Give Thanos -1 Cost.

name: Titania
ability: After ANY card is played here, this card switches sides.

name: Toad
ability: On Reveal: Move the last card you played to this location.

name: Tombstone
ability: On Reveal: Destroy your lowest-Power card at each other location.

name: Topaz
ability: After you play a card here, move it to the middle location.

name: Toxie Doxie
ability: On Reveal: Give 2 characters in your hand +2 Power. You can't play them next turn.

name: Toxie Doxie - Thunderbolts
ability: On Reveal: Give 2 characters in your hand +3 Power. You can't play them next turn unless they're Thunderbolts.

name: Toxin
ability: On Reveal: Return your other cards here to your hand. +2 Power for each returned.

name: Triton
ability: On Reveal: Give the last character EACH player played last turn +3 Power.

name: Typhoid Mary
ability: Ongoing: Your other cards here have -2 Power.

name: U.S. Agent
ability: Ongoing: 4-Cost or more cards here have -3 Power.

name: Uatu the Watcher
ability: Game Start: You can see the unrevealed locations.

name: Ultron
ability: On Reveal: Deploy four 2-Power Drones to each other location.

name: Ultron Mind Stone
ability: Ongoing: Your On Reveal abilities here repeat.

name: Ultron Power Stone
ability: On Reveal: Double Infinity Ultron's Power.

name: Ultron Reality Stone
ability: On Reveal: Add a Drone here. Set its Power to Infinity Ultron's.

name: Ultron Soul Stone
ability: On Reveal: For each of your full locations, give one of your cards there +3 Power.

name: Ultron Space Stone
ability: On Reveal: Move the lowest-Power enemy card here to the location of Infinity Ultron.

name: Ultron Time Stone
ability: On Reveal: Put a card from your hand here.

name: Uncle Ben
ability: When Destroyed: Replace this with Spider-Man.

name: Valentina
ability: On Reveal: Add a random 6-Cost card to your hand. Give it -2 Cost and -2 Power.

name: Valentina - Thunderbolts
ability: On Reveal: Add a random Thunderbolt to your hand. Give it -1 Cost.

name: Valkyrie
ability: On Reveal: Set ALL cards here to 3 Power.

name: Venom
ability: On Reveal: Destroy your other cards here. Add their Power to this card.

name: Venus
ability: When your cards in play are Empowered, give those cards an additional +1 Power.

name: Vibranium
ability: Ongoing: Can't be destroyed.

name: Vibro-Shock Gauntlets
ability: On Reveal: Give your highest-Power card here +2 Power. You get +1 Energy next turn.

name: Victoria Hand
ability: Ongoing: Your cards that were created in your hand have +2 Power.

name: Viper
ability: On Reveal: One of your other cards here with the lowest Power switches sides.

name: Vision
ability: Moveable

name: Vision - Avengers
ability: Moveable while you have another Avenger here.

name: Viv Vision
ability: At the start of each turn, give all cards in your hand +1 Power if you're winning here. Otherwise, move this to another location.

name: Vulture
ability: When this card moves, +3 Power.

name: Wade Wilson
ability: When Destroyed: Replace this with a 1-Cost card from your hand or deck with +2 Power.

name: Wakanda Forever
ability: On Reveal: Give Power equal to your Champion's to one of your cards here.

name: War Machine
ability: Ongoing: Nothing can stop you from playing cards anywhere.

name: Warlock
ability: Activate: For each unspent Energy, give a card in your hand -1 Cost.

name: Warpath
ability: Ongoing: If any of your locations are empty, +5 Power.

name: Wasp
flavor: "My secret power is that I get things done."

name: Wave
ability: On Reveal: All cards cost a maximum of 4 until the end of next turn.

name: Weapon H
ability: When Discarded: Put this back with -2 Cost.

name: Weapon X Wolverine
flavor: After one of your other cards is destroyed, +1 Power. After every 3rd time, improve this effect by 1. (0/3)

name: Weapon X Wolverine Champion
flavor: After one of your other cards is destroyed, +1 Power. After every 3rd time, improve this effect by 1. (0/3)

name: Web Sling
ability: On Reveal: Next turn, one of your cards here is Moveable and gets +1 Power when it moves. (your choice)

name: Werewolf By Night
ability: After you play a card, move there to gain +2 Power if it has an On Reveal.

name: White Queen
ability: On Reveal: Copy the card that costs the most from your opponent's hand into your hand.

name: White Queen - Brotherhood of Mutants
ability: On Reveal: Copy the top card of your opponent's deck into your hand. While you're winning here, it costs 2 less.

name: White Tiger
ability: On Reveal: Add a 10-Power Tiger to another location.

name: White Widow
ability: On Reveal: Add a Widow's Kiss to your opponent's side of this location.

name: Wiccan
ability: On Reveal: If you've spent all your Energy on previous turns, +2 Max Energy.

name: Widow's Bite
ability: While this is in your hand, you can't draw cards.

name: Widow's Kiss
ability: Destroy this when your side of this location is full.

name: Wild Child
ability: Ongoing: +4 Power if you've discarded a card. +4 Power if one of your cards has been destroyed.

name: Wilson Fisk
ability: Costs 3 if you have the highest Power among cards in play.

name: Winds of Watoomb
ability: On Reveal: Afflict an enemy card here with -5 Power and move it right.

name: Winter Soldier
flavor: "It's time for me to face the past."

name: Winter Soldier - Thunderbolts
ability: You can only play this at a location you're losing.

name: Witchfire
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent draws a card, increase its cost by 1.

name: Wolfsbane
ability: On Reveal: +2 Power for each other card you have here.

name: Wolverine
ability: When Discarded or Destroyed: Regenerate this with +2 Power at a random location.

name: Wolverine - X-Men
ability: At the start of each turn, +2 Power if you have any bonus Energy.

name: Wolverine Horseman of War
ability: Objective: This has 5 or more Power  Give one of your cards at each location +4 Power. (3/5)

name: Wong
ability: Ongoing: Your On Reveal abilities here repeat.

name: X-23
ability: When Discarded or Destroyed: Regenerate this at a random location and you get +1 Energy next turn.

name: Xorn
ability: After ANY 3 or 4-Cost card is played here, move it to another location.

name: YakaArrow
ability: !none

name: Yellowjacket
ability: On Reveal: Afflict your other cards here with -1 Power.

name: Yo-Yo
ability: When this card moves, move it back with +1 Power.

name: Yondu
ability: On Reveal: Banish the card that costs the least in your opponent's deck.

name: Zabu
ability: On Reveal: Give each 4-Cost card in your deck -1 Cost.

name: Zero
ability: On Reveal: Remove the abilities on the next card you play.

name: Zombie Captain Marvel
ability: Activate: Destroy your other cards here to get +3 Power for each. Move to a location you're losing.

name: Zombie Galacti
ability: Game Start: Choose 6 other characters in your deck. On Reveal: Transform those cards into copies of this.

name: Zombie Giant-Man
ability: On Reveal: Horde +2, then this gains Power equal to your Zombie Horde.

name: Zombie Mister Fantastic
ability: On Reveal: Horde +2. Activate: Give 4 of your created cards +1 Power.

name: Zombie Power Man
ability: End of Turn: If you're winning here, discard the leftmost card from your hand.

name: Zombie Scarlet Witch
ability: After you play a card here, Horde +2.

name: Zombie Sentry
ability: On Reveal: Horde +1 for each of your cards at the right location.
